ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* The zip code itself */,
  "primary_city" TEXT /* Primary city associated with the zip code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the zip code is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code's geographic center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code's geographic center */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the zip code is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the zip code (e.g., UNIQUE, STANDARD) */,
  "world_region" TEXT /* World region where the zip code is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the zip code is located */,
  "decommissioned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zip code has been decommissioned */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the zip code */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the zip code */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area covered by the zip code (in square kilometers or square miles) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zip code (population per square kilometer or square mile) */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income for the zip code */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household in the zip code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the zip code data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population history record */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population estimate */,
  "estimated_population" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the given year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the gender distribution of the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the population history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (if any) */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., State, County, City) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area covered by the region (in square kilometers or square miles) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_region_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip-region mapping */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the zip-region mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_region_mapping_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_region_mapping_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the zip code was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session during which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the data source was checked for updates */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the reliability of the data source (e.g., on a scale of 1 to 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
